name: Security Model Lock
description: Automatically switch to a secure model when sensitive skill files are read via the read tool, and lock the session to prevent switching back.

sensitiveSkills.description: List of sensitive skill names (matches SKILL.md name field). When LLM reads a skill file, the session will be locked.

secureModel.description: The secure model to switch to when a sensitive skill file is read

lockNotice.description: Custom notice message when lock is triggered
lockNotice.default: 检测到敏感 skill 调用，已切换到安全模型。会话已锁定，无法切换回其他模型。

skillsDir.description: Custom skills directory path (default: auto-detect from cwd and ~/.openclaw/skills)
